chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF THE FUQAHA (JURISTS) AND THE ULAMA (SCHOLARS)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 484)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 484)
text: كَانَتْ نَاقَةُ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ (صلى الله عليه وآله) الْقَصْوَاءُ إِذَا نَزَلَ عَنْهَا عَلَّقَ عَلَيْهَا زِمَامَهَا قَالَ فَتَخْرُجُ فَتَأْتِي الْمُسْلِمِينَ قَالَ فَيُنَاوِلُهَا الرَّجُلُ الشَّيْ‏ءَ وَ يُنَاوِلُهُ هَذَا الشَّيْ‏ءَ فَلَا تَلْبَثُ أَنْ تَشْبَعَ قَالَ فَأَدْخَلَتْ رَأْسَهَا فِي خِبَاءِ سَمُرَةَ بْنِ جُنْدَبٍ فَتَنَاوَلَ عَنَزَةً فَضَرَبَ بِهَا عَلَى رَأْسِهَا فَشَجَّهَا فَخَرَجَتْ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ (صلى الله عليه وآله) فَشَكَتْهُ.

en.hubeali: H 14963 – Aban, from Abu Baseer, who has narrated the following:

Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Whenever the Rasool Allahsaww descended from hissaww she-camel Al-Qaswa, hesaww would leave its reins upon it. It would go out and come to the Muslims. So this man would give it something, and that man would give it something. So it would not remain without (its hunger) is being satisfied. It entered its head in a tent of Samarat Bin Jundab, so he took hold of a stick and struck it upon its head. So he scratched it. So it went out to the Prophetsaww and complained to himsaww’.
en.sarwar: 516. Aban, from a man, who said: Abu Abdullah (a.s.) has said that: ‘Maryam (as) carried (in her (as)) Isa (as) for nine hours, each hour for a month’.
